description: A new nonprofit customer, 'Green Earth Foundation', has provided a tax exemption certificate. Configure Odoo to handle this exemption automatically by creating a Fiscal Position named 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' that maps default sales taxes to none. Create a customer record for 'Green Earth Foundation' (Company) with address 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704, email accounting@greenearthfoundation.org, and phone (217) 555-0142, ensuring the 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' fiscal position is applied. Create and confirm a Sales Order for this customer for 10 units of 'Organic Compost Bin - Large' and 5 units of 'Solar-Powered Garden Light Set'.
